parsed.availability_comment: NZC confirmed recovery from abdominal surgery in October 2025, and MI list him in the 2026 squad with no current restriction reported.
parsed.availability_note: Recovered from 2025 surgery; no fresh issue found before IPL 2026.
parsed.followup_reason: No active availability concern found; only normal selection-combination uncertainty remains.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Good balance option, but MI have several viable overseas combinations so he is not fully locked.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Competes for four overseas spots against Boult, Jacks, Rickelton/de Kock, Bosch, Rutherford and Ghazanfar.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained core overseas all-rounder; likely starter but combo can shift with MI's other overseas options.
